status: finite observed x-parallel Bellman-barrier and realized-node escape certificate; not a universal tail lemma, availability bound, safety fixed point, or unconditional theorem

finite_observed_scope.data: one pinned realized L5-L8 closed-lineage graph
finite_observed_scope.graph_semantics: step-only arbitrary-switching over exact edges observed in the pinned realized graph; this is an overapproximation of those finite records, not a universal Post relation

finite_observed_bellman_certificate.threshold_definition: H_s is the maximum S-norm of an interior candidate site over the reconstructed effective connector domain for step s
finite_observed_bellman_certificate.barrier_definition: D_s=max over observed coarse edges e:s->t of (||c_e||_S+D_t/3); an empty observed maximum is assigned zero
finite_observed_bellman_certificate.arithmetic: exact rational squared norms and outward rational square-root/fixed-point intervals
finite_observed_bellman_certificate.interpretation: H_s>D_s only identifies a potential x-parallel effectful exterior for this observed graph; it does not assert that an old secant realizes that exterior. H_s<=D_s only places the candidate-site effect region in this observed Bellman core.

finite_observed_realized_node_join.classification_rule: core if exact h^2<=D_lower^2; exterior if exact h^2>D_upper^2; interval overlap would be unresolved

finite_observed_claims_verified: all 124 effective domains match the pinned word and candidate-site metadata in the authoritative reconstruction order
all reported signs of H_s-D_s follow from disjoint outward rational intervals on the finite observed coarse graph
all 35220 pinned strict or latent lineage nodes are separated from their step barrier interval with no unresolved overlap
all 13826 recorded transitions from certified exterior nodes obey the exact lateral recurrence and have a strictly positive certified lower bound for delta_target-3*delta_source
all 36 finite exact effect-key return sources and all six finite effect-and-selected-action return sources lie in the observed Bellman core

claims_not_established: that the observed step-only graph is a universal Post relation or a transition-congruent quotient
that the six observed-terminal step types have no successors in alternate histories or at L9 and later
that the potential exterior annulus contains a realized old secant
control of non-x directions, endpoint-on-candidate-line poisoning, near-deep joins, deep-deep births, or Boolean unions of poison channels
a finite promoted core, a uniform residual rank, positive connector availability, or a greatest-fixed-point safety strategy
universal_status.remaining_far_secant_requirement: Construct a sound history-independent state or a contraction/ranking argument whose universal successor relation covers alternate connector choices and later levels, includes all secant-birth and join channels, and proves that every reachable core state retains at least one legal connector.
universal_status.referee_conclusion: The pinned computation proves an exterior escape inequality only for the recorded x-parallel transitions. It isolates the observed Bellman core as the unresolved region; it does not close that core or convert finite path evidence into a universal availability theorem.
